title: Thara Concept Pomegranate Nuit Luxury Vegan Cocosoy Aromatherapy Candle -55 hr+ Burn Time- 240 G
features: The scent has a mystery brought by the perfectly blended notes of pomegranate, pink pepper, and rhubarb. The spicy floral heart of jasmine and rose is shaped by the bold presence of amber, patchouli, and cedarwood.

Top Notes Bergamot, Plum, Pomegranate These are the scents you notice immediately after applying the perfume. They are fresh, fruity, and vibrant, designed to make a strong first impression. However, they tend to evaporate quickly, usually within 15-30 minutes.

Middle Notes (Heart Notes) Lily, Jasmine, Rose These notes appear as the top notes fade and form the core of the fragrance. They are floral and elegant, providing the perfume’s main character and lasting for several hours.

Base Notes Cedarwood, Amber, Patchouli These are the longest-lasting notes, emerging as the middle notes dissipate. They are warm, earthy, and grounding, adding depth and ensuring the fragrance lingers on the skin.
This composition starts with a fruity burst, transitions into a rich floral bouquet, and settles into a warm, woody base, making it a well-rounded and sophisticated scent.
Ingredients: * 100% Natural Plant-Based Candles from Sustainable Sources * Wood wick that crackles while burning * Paraben, Dyes, Palm, and Lead - Free * Vegan and Cruelty-Free
